name: receiving-code-review
tagline: Behavioral guide for responding to code review feedback with technical verification instead of reflexive agreement.
verdict: Well-structured behavioral skill with a clear response pattern and concrete good/bad examples for pushback, verification, and acknowledgment. Minor gaps: no out-of-scope guidance, undeclared gh CLI dependency for PR replies, no versioning signal.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' or out-of-scope section; broad 'code review' domain with no guard against misfire on giving reviews.
Uses `gh api repos/{owner}/{repo}/pulls/{pr}/comments/{id}/replies` without declaring or checking the gh CLI is installed/authenticated.
No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes anywhere in the skill.
